ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin airport */,
  "destination_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "departure_terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure terminal */,
  "arrival_terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival terminal */,
  "last_update_status" TEXT /* Last update status of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "flight_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the flight */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (domestic/international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_address" TEXT /* Address of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "terminal_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminal */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the terminal is located */,
  "terminal_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gates" (
  "gate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gate */,
  "gate_name" TEXT /* Name of the gate */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal where the gate is located */,
  "gate_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the gate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gates_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_assignments_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_assignments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_updates_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_aircraft_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircraft_assignments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircraft_assignments_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_cancellations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
column_names: Last update status of the flight
City where the airport is located
Country where the airport is located
ID of the airport where the terminal is located
ID of the terminal where the gate is located
Unique identifier for each status update
Time when the status was updated

Date when the report was generated
